{%- for top in page.data.top -%}

{{ top.type }}

{%- comment -%} Pre-pass: collect all groups (path excluding last two segments {libname}/src/). {%- endcomment -%} {%- assign group_names = "" -%} {%- for category in top.categories -%} {%- assign parts = category.name | split: "/" -%} {%- assign parts_size = parts | size -%} {%- assign limit = parts_size | minus: 2 -%} {%- assign group = "" -%} {%- for part in parts -%} {%- assign idx = forloop.index0 -%} {%- if idx < limit -%} {%- if group == "" -%} {%- assign group = part -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture group -%}{{ group }}/{{ part }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- assign group_names = group_names | append: group | append: "|" -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- assign group_list = group_names | split: "|" | uniq | sort -%} {%- for current_group in group_list -%} {%- if current_group == "" -%}{%- continue -%}{%- endif -%}

{{ current_group }}

    {%- for category in top.categories -%} {%- assign parts = category.name | split: "/" -%} {%- assign parts_size = parts | size -%} {%- assign limit = parts_size | minus: 2 -%} {%- assign group = "" -%} {%- for part in parts -%} {%- assign idx = forloop.index0 -%} {%- if idx < limit -%} {%- if group == "" -%} {%- assign group = part -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture group -%}{{ group }}/{{ part }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- if group == current_group -%} {%- for item in category.pages -%} {%- if site.filename-index -%} {%- assign name = item.filename -%} {%- else -%} {%- assign name = item.path -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if item.title -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{item.title | xml_escape }} ({{ name | xml_escape }}){%- endcapture -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{name | xml_escape }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%}
  • {{ site.icons[item.icon] }} {{ link_title | xml_escape }}
    • {%- endfor -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- endfor -%} {%- endfor -%}
